questions.text: __________ is the mass processing of orders in batch mode, where order confirmations are changed to accommodate business priorities and changes in the demand/supply situation of your order fulfillment process.
BOP calculates the distribution of the remaining stock after SUP and PAL based on the defined strategy
The only Fiori tile which takes into consideration not just the different stock levels, but inbound and outbound stock movements as well. is called
The right Fiori tile to check stock availability that will consider all movements. is
As part of the new ways of working with NEO, ATP checks will only be performed at delivery level and no longer at sales order level
